review_title: Visualogyx - Very good for construction reporting!
description: Flexible, responsive support team, easy to use.
author: Lauren A.
pros: Ease of editing and flexibility of formatting.
cons: Nothing yet - everything I want to be able to change I can change.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: From the sales process, through implementation, and on going support the visualogyx team has been great to work with.
author: Hunter L.
pros: The partnership from visualogyx's team has been second to none. They consistently go out of their way to ensure we are getting the most out of the platform that we possibly can.
cons: Some of our end users have a bit of trouble from time to time, but visualogyx is always willing to help guide them in the right direction
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall, my experience with Visualogyx was positive. The platform's user-friendly interface and visually appealing data visualizations made it enjoyable to work with. It provided me with valuable insights and helped me analyze complex data sets more effectively. Although there were some limitations in terms of customization options and occasional performance issues, the overall functionality and usability of Visualogyx were commendable. I found it to be a valuable tool for data analysis and decision-making.
author: Marek T.
pros: One of the things I liked most about Visualogyx was its user-friendly interface and intuitive design. Navigating through the platform was smooth and straightforward, allowing me to easily access and utilize its various features. The visualizations and data representations provided by Visualogyx were impressive and visually appealing. They helped me gain valuable insights and make informed decisions based on the data analysis.
cons: While Visualogyx had many positive aspects, one thing I liked least was the limited customization options. I felt that the platform could benefit from more flexibility in terms of tailoring the visualizations and reports to specific needs or preferences. Additionally, there were a few instances where I experienced minor glitches or delays when loading large datasets, which could be improved for a smoother user experience.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Visualogyx is not only a highly reliable and user-friendly platform but also exceptionally well-organized, making it easy to navigate. The staff is highly responsive, promptly addressing any issues and efficiently implementing requested features or enhancements. Their commitment to continuous improvement and customer satisfaction sets them apart. Highly recommended.
author: Ernesto Q.
pros: The team’s responsiveness and willingness to enhance features only add to its value. Overall, it has been a seamless experience.
cons: I haven’t encountered any issues or concerns with the platform. It has been reliable, easy to use, and well-organized.

description: Overall a very good experience. I usually do reports via a clipboard and pen so i was hesitant at first. Visualogyx was very intuitive and easy to pick up. I will be happy using them for future contracts.
author: Jason O.
pros: How quickly customer service responded to issues. They really seemed to update the application quite often as well.
cons: The load times when reopening the application. Having to sync with other inspectors data’s. Sometimes app just shows a white screen, I then have to restart entire app which then causes the first issue.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very comfortable with every report Good to understand
author: Victor S.
pros: Reports are easy to input Great software
cons: The update take long Making another report we have to close to many repairs from someone else
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I like Visualogyx professional style and staff is helpful and always quick to respond.
author: Julius S.
pros: Report Style. Easy to upload photos and info.
cons: No spellcheck. Cannot rearrange photos. Should have button to go to beginning and end of report instead of page by page. Should be able to copy or save as reports.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Maximizing Resources Providing Visibility and Transparency to Our Daily Activities
description: Excellent!!, Our team feels very comfortable working with this application, allowing them to be more efficient in their activities, and reducing the development time of the reports.
author: Ricardo M.
pros: Visualogyx was extremely easy to implement. On the first day, we could use it, and our customers liked the documents generated by our team.
cons: I don't see any issues, the product fits quite well with our business, processes, and resources.

description: 5 star Great customer service Quick reaponses
author: Daniel R.
cons: Accidentally delete templates, can’t retrieve myself
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Visualogyx has allowed us to automate many of our quality control processes across our operations. Our field team now spends less time doing manual work while allowing our operations team to access key real time data as inspections are performed. It’s a game changer for our industry and a great value added to our ISO9001-29001 programs. Thanks to its mobile feature, we can leverage the time spend in the field to get completed reports in minutes. The web interface makes it easy to navigate the APP configuration and set report templates quickly.
author: Edgardo V.
pros: Mobile which makes it usable in the field , flexible which allows for multiple applications and easy to configure.
cons: It did not had an out of the box interphase to our ERP system.

author: Mladens S.
pros: Visualogyx has help us to improve the efficiency and control of our industrial and administrative process.The portability of the tool is great! we could work from anywhere offline and online! it helps to reduce paper consumption!!
cons: The tool works really good for us !!!!

description: It is a very helpful app for work.
author: Juan S.
pros: It helps us to be more efficient with work.
cons: So far everything is going well, and help get jobs done faster.

review_title: Visualogys as enhancing company operations tool
description: Our customers develop their operation in far away job sites which have no any insternet source, VLX has allow us keep doing inspection and as soon the team inspector have connection, the APP sincronize and send all the reports made previusly
author: Andres M.
pros: VLX has provided us a fast and reliable way to make, upload and share inspection report no matter if the user has internet at the moment of the inspection
cons: At this point, it cant can be integrated or communicate with a ERP system

description: Excellent app that has helped me make inspection report easy
author: Jorge V.
pros: The most impactful feature is monitor inspection in real time.The app is ease to use.Integration of Visualogyx data to generate KPI reports in PowerBi
cons: The battery consumption can improve abd photo editing

review_title: Easy to use software for Project Management
author: Shweta R.
pros: I love that apart from auditing and inspecting, I can use this software for data gathering. As a writer, I collect information from different sources for different projects. At times it is difficult to keep a log in notes or documents. With Visualogyx, I can capture audio, video, text, and image data which helps me keep all my projects organized. The best part is, they have an application too! So, all I need is my phone, which I always have with me. I'm having a great experience. Thank you!
cons: There's nothing I do not like as of now, but if I could integrate Visualogyx with some other Project management apps for easy data transfer, it would be great!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Very helpful to make reports on the field.
description: I can make a report on real time and at the end I can download the report with the pictures.
author: Abraham G.
pros: Easy to use. Can use on my mobile and PC.
cons: Nothing, I find everything satisfying and there are no issues to report.
